intent: Runnable, production-ready Ceramic templates with source files, routes, manifests, and deterministic demo data.

statusModel.available: A runnable template bundled with source files and available through the CLI copy command.

templates.title: SaaS Solution Website
templates.purpose: A complete product-led SaaS website with marketing, product, automation, integrations, customer proof, pricing, changelog, and sales-contact pages.
templates.referenceNote: Uses Linear only as a reference for information density, section rhythm, and product-led storytelling. Do not copy Linear branding, assets, layouts, or product copy.
useWhen: A SaaS product needs a complete product-led marketing narrative
Workflow, automation, integrations, and reliability are material buying criteria
avoidWhen: The page is a single-feature launch
There is no reviewed product model behind the interface claims

ar.title: موقع متكامل لحل SaaS
ar.purpose: عائلة صفحات SaaS متكاملة تشمل التسويق والمنتج والأتمتة والتكاملات وأدلة العملاء والأسعار والتحديثات والتواصل مع المبيعات.
